posts.author: MarkP (Mark)
posts.cookedHtml:
Does anyone have more information on the monday.labs feature called “Convert Board to Project”? I’m interested in understanding what this feature does and how to use it effectively but cannot seem to find any specifics.

Thanks!

image711×471 37.2 KB

posts.author: einavpeleg (Einav Peleg)
posts.cookedHtml:
It’s part of the new portfolio solution. They did a very on point webinar about it last week, you should try and find the recording, although I don’t think they released it yet.
